zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Llewellyn ap Owen於1320年之前與Llewellyn ap Owen在威爾士結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs Llewellyn ap Owen于1320年之前与Llewellyn ap Owen在威尔士结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: from a short form of the personal name Adelhard, which is of ancient Germanic origin, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + hard ‘bold, hardy’. Compare Ale and Alma 4.

variants.name: Ale
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos Enrique, Cesar, Jose, Maria De Jesus.
Italian (Sicily; Alé): probably a variant of Aleo .

nameMeanings.name: Owen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Owain, from Latin Eugenius (see Eugene ). This Welsh personal name is cognate with Old Irish Eogán, see 2 and 3.
Scottish and Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Eoghain ‘son of Eoghan’. See McEwen .
Irish: from Ó hEoghain, ‘descendant of Eoghan’. See Ewen .

variants.name: Owens
meanings: Welsh: variant of Owen , with post-medieval excrescent English -s.
Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form by bearers of the Gaelic surname Mac Eoghain (see McEwen ).

variants.name: Eugene
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Gesner, Lucienne, Yanick, Alphonse, Amie, Andre, Dany, Edwige, Jean Marc, Jean-Robert, Lafontant.

French (Eugène); West Indian (in Haiti, Martinique, and Guadeloupe Eugène): from the French personal name Eugène, Latin Eugenius, from Greek Eugenios, a derivative of eugenēs ‘well-born, noble’. The name Eugenios or Eugenius was borne by a 3rd-century bishop and martyr, who gave the personal name some currency during the Middle Ages, as well as by several other early Christian saints and four popes. This surname is most common in Haiti.
Americanized form of Greek patronymics from the personal name Evgenios, from classical Greek Eugenios ‘Eugene’ (see 1 above), for example Evgeniadis or Evgenidis.

nameMeanings.name: Llewellyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

variants.name: Llywellyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Llewellyn ap Owen married Llewellyn ap Owen before 1320, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Llewellyn ap Owen a épousé Llewellyn ap Owen avant 1320, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs Llewellyn ap Owen hat vor 1320 in Wales Llewellyn ap Owen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs Llewellyn ap Owen lei sposato Llewellyn ap Owen prima del 1320, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Llewellyn ap Owenは1320年以前にウェールズでLlewellyn ap Owenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Llewellyn ap Owen(은)는 1320년 이전 웨일스에서 Llewellyn ap Owen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs Llewellyn ap Owen casou-se com Llewellyn ap Owen antes 1320, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Llewellyn ap Owen вышла замуж за человека по имени Llewellyn ap Owen перед 1320 г. в местности Уэльс. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs Llewellyn ap Owen se casó con Llewellyn ap Owen antes de 1320, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
